name: @pryzm/marketplace-web
description: PRYZM Family Marketplace browse/detail SPA (S59 deliverable). Browse published `.pryzm-family` artefacts produced by `apps/component-editor` via the publish flow at `apps/component-editor/src/marketplace/publishFlow.ts` and served by `server/familyMarketplaceRoutes.js` at `/api/v1/families`. Verifies Ed25519 signatures client-side using the author JWK embedded in the manifest before download links are exposed.
